name: Marmalade Biscuit Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and marmalade, mixing well. Spread mixture evenly in a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a medium bowl, combine biscuit mix and cold water. Stir vigorously until a soft dough is formed.
3. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface. Knead lightly about 5 times.
4. Roll the dough into an 8-inch square, about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Place the rolled dough on top of the marmalade mixture. Cut into 36 squares.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes. Immediately invert onto a serving dish.
